Retroactive authorization approved following successful appeal. Original MRI claim denied 2025-02-18 for missing prior auth. Appeal decision overturned denial — medical necessity confirmed based on knee X-ray findings and clinical exam.
Prior authorization approved for knee arthroscopy with meniscectomy. MRI confirmed medial meniscus tear right knee. Conservative treatment (6 weeks PT, NSAIDs) failed. Surgery medically necessary.

service_description: Ozempic (Semaglutide) 0.5mg/1mg injection pen — GLP-1 receptor agonist for Type 2 Diabetes
denial_reason: Step therapy requirement not met. Plan formulary requires trial and failure of a preferred SGLT2 inhibitor (e.g., Jardiance/empagliflozin) before GLP-1 agonist coverage. Member has not documented prior use of SGLT2 inhibitor.
clinical_notes: Endocrinologist requests Ozempic for improved glycemic control. Current regimen: Metformin 1000mg BID, A1C 7.8%. Denied per formulary step therapy policy — must trial Jardiance first.

service_description: Ozempic (Semaglutide) 0.5mg/1mg injection pen — GLP-1 receptor agonist for Type 2 Diabetes
clinical_notes: Step therapy requirement satisfied. Patient trialed Jardiance (empagliflozin) 10mg from March–June 2025. Documented treatment failure: recurrent urinary tract infections (N39.0) requiring discontinuation. A1C remains above target at 7.5%. Ozempic approved for 12-month period.
